info.title: DigiPulse API
info.description: API documentation for the DigiPulse monitoring system. **Authentication:** Use these endpoints to register, login, and manage user tokens.

post.description: Authenticate a user and return a token
Send a verification email to the authenticated user
Verify user email using POST request with signature
Send a password reset link to the user's email

message.example: We have emailed your password reset link.

422.description: Validation failed or user not found

post.description: Reset user password using the token from email

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information

get.description: Display a listing of available check types.

post.summary: Store a new check result from the monitor service
post.description: Store a new check result from the monitor service.

get.description: Display a listing of the user's sites.

post.description: Creates a new site for monitoring. You can optionally pass an array of checks to be configured for this site.

put.description: Update the specified site in storage.

delete.description: Remove the specified site from storage.

get.summary: Get aggregated check history for a site
get.description: Returns hourly aggregated stats (avg response time, uptime %) and a list of individual "down" incidents for the given ISO week. Defaults to the current week if no `week` param is provided. For past weeks (older than 7 days), data is served from the weekly archive.

parameters.name: week
parameters.description: ISO-8601 week string (e.g. 2024-W15). Defaults to the current week.

parameters.name: configuration_id
parameters.description: Filter results to a single check configuration.

post.description: Store a newly created support ticket.

get.description: Display a specific support ticket with its messages.

post.summary: Add a message to an existing ticket
post.description: Add a message to an existing ticket.

get.description: Generate a connection token for the authenticated user.

post.description: Disconnect the Telegram bot for the authenticated user.

description.example: Verifies the website returns a 200 OK.

stats.description: Hourly aggregated check data for graphing

incidents.description: Individual "down" events for incident markers on the chart

SupportTicketMessageSchema.title: Support Ticket Message
SupportTicketMessageSchema.description: A message within a support ticket

message.example: Thank you for your request. We are looking into it.
I am having trouble adding my first site.

id.description: Existing configuration ID to update, if provided

frontendKey.description: Custom frontend key for API access
frontendKey.name: X-Frontend-Key
